name: CEA Industries Inc.
business: CEA Industries Inc. is a digital asset treasury company focused exclusively on BNB, the native token of the BNB Chain ecosystem. It also operates a retail nicotine vape business in Canada through its Fat Panda subsidiary, and an industrial climate control systems business for controlled environment agriculture. The company holds 515,544 BNB tokens as of April 30, 2026.
sellsTo: Investors seeking exposure to BNB through a public company
Retail consumers of vaping products in Canada

exposures.sentence: We seek to continue to build and manage the largest corporate treasury of BNB to provide institutional-grade exposure to BNB Chain and to generate income on our eligible BNB holdings through active treasury management, derivatives, or through Airdrops.
Fat Panda is one of Central Canada’s largest retailer and manufacturer of e-cigarettes, vape devices and e-liquids.

We provide a comprehensive range of service solutions that include assistance with facility design and budgeting in cooperation with the customers' engineering, architectural and construction teams, equipment selection and specification, and support for equipment installation and start up.
